# External Documentation

> **Public-facing documentation for developers, AI agents, and users of the Cybereum protocol.**
> Everything in this directory is safe to share externally. It covers protocol design, integration guides, product information, and the agent knowledge base.

---

## Sections

### [protocol/](protocol/_index.md) — Core Protocol Design & Architecture
System architecture, fee model, security model, and complete contract reference. The technical foundation.

### [guides/](guides/_index.md) — How-To Guides
Audience-oriented guides: agent onboarding, builder integration, operations. Start here if you're new.

### [agents/](agents/_index.md) — Agent Knowledge Base
Code-first documentation for AI agents: workflows, copy-paste recipes, troubleshooting, advanced patterns. The most comprehensive section.

### [product/](product/_index.md) — Product & Business
Product guide, changelog, and vision. Public-facing product information.

### [knowledge-base/](knowledge-base/_index.md) — Technical Knowledge Base
Growing wiki of concepts, design patterns, standards references, and research relevant to agent economies and smart contracts.

---

## Article Counts

| Section | Articles | Focus |
|---|---|---|
| protocol/ | 4 | Architecture, fees, security, contract reference |
| guides/ | 4 | Onboarding, quickstart, integration, operations |
| agents/ | 16 | Workflows, recipes, troubleshooting, patterns |
| product/ | 2 | Product guide, changelog |
| knowledge-base/ | 14 | Concepts (6), research (1), patterns (3), references (3), + 1 section index |
| **Total** | **40** | |

## Internal Docs

Internal documentation (TODOs, reviews, audit findings, roadmap, deployment readiness, architecture research) is in [../internal/](../internal/_index.md). These are not intended for external consumption.
